// Repo-health checks: These scripts used to run in pre-commit and were briefly run silently via emeraldwalk.runonsave. Defined as tasks with problem matchers so failures surface as squiggles + Problems-panel entries instead of disappearing into an output channel. Triggered on save by gruntfuggly.triggertaskonsave (see settings.json).
// Diagnostic format contract: Each script emits `path:line: message` per failure (see check_go_modules.py / check_go_work.py for how anchor lines are chosen). The matcher pattern below parses that into VS Code diagnostics. The matcher's `owner` namespaces the diagnostics so a re-run with no findings clears the previous run's squiggles.
